_comment: Project-level deny list + roundtable observability hooks for Claude Code. Copy this file to <project_root>/.claude/settings.json (skill: roundtable-setup). Once present, the turn scripts skip the inline --disallowedTools fallback. Hooks rely on $ROUNDTABLE_HIST_DIR being exported by claude_turn.sh; outside of roundtable dispatch they no-op silently.

hooks.command: if [ -n "$ROUNDTABLE_HIST_DIR" ]; then mkdir -p "$ROUNDTABLE_HIST_DIR" && { cat; printf '\n'; } >> "$ROUNDTABLE_HIST_DIR/edits.log" 2>/dev/null || true; else cat >/dev/null; fi
if [ -n "$ROUNDTABLE_HIST_DIR" ]; then mkdir -p "$ROUNDTABLE_HIST_DIR" && cat > "$ROUNDTABLE_HIST_DIR/stop.json" 2>/dev/null || true; else cat >/dev/null; fi
